meta.title: Roulstone Reed Construction
meta.description: Roulstone Reed Construction - quality builds across commercial, residential, and industrial projects throughout the UK.

hero.title: Roulstone Reed
hero.tagline: Quality building, delivered with care - from groundwork to handover.

about.title: About Roulstone Reed
about.text: We turn plans into buildings - on time, on budget, and built to last. Trusted by clients who expect skilled workmanship, clear communication, and attention to detail.

services.text: Our construction services cover new builds, extensions, and refurbishments - delivered with skilled trades, reliable programme management, and lasting quality.

showroom.title: Careful planning, precise execution, and pride in every detail.
showroom.address: Serving clients across the United Kingdom

projects.intro: Every project reflects our commitment to craft, collaboration, and getting the details right.

items.quote: We aim to deliver every project on time and on budget - with professional, punctual service our clients are happy to recommend.
items.name: James R

items.quote: Clear communication at every stage. One of the best experiences we've had working with a construction team.
items.name: Sarah M.

items.quote: Meticulous workmanship from start to finish. We would not hesitate to recommend Roulstone Reed.
items.name: David K.

contact.title: Ready to start your build?
contact.text: Tell us about your project - we will take it from there.
